channel.title: Sports
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Sports, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Kansas State Fires Coach Jerome Tang, Citing 'Public Comments and Conduct'
item.description: Kansas State fired basketball coach Jerome Tang on Sunday night.

item.title: Growing Up a NASCAR Fan, Michael Jordan Enjoys the Ultimate Victory
item.description: The NBA's GOAT found himself on top of the NASCAR world Sunday at the Daytona 500 thanks to Tyler Reddick's win.

item.title: Men's College Basketball Rankings: Purdue, Texas Tech Make Massive Jumps
item.description: FOX Sports' Casey Jacobsen shares his latest men's college hoops rankings with several big moves this week.

item.title: 4 Takeaways From Daytona 500 as Tyler Reddick, Michael Jordan Celebrate Huge Win
item.description: Tyler Reddick and Michael Jordan have a lot to celebrate after getting into Victory Lane at the Daytona 500.

item.title: 'The Big One' At Daytona 500 Involves 20 Cars In Huge Wreck Up Front
item.description: Sunday's Daytona 500 was relatively smooth-sailing through the first 123 laps, and then "The Big One" happened.

item.title: Women's Bracketology: Finding meaning in the metrics
item.description: The selection committee's first reveal of the season leaned into head-to-head, but the metric isn't the only answer.

item.title: Who's really fastest in 2026? F1's new rules are confusing the pecking order -- and the drivers
item.description: Formula 1's new era was always going to bring questions, but its first week of serious running has raised more than most. With one more preseason test...

item.title: Transfer rumors, news: Arsenal eye Real Madrid teenager ValdepeÃ±as
item.description: Real Madrid's Victor ValdepeÃ±as is among Arsenal's favored options as Mikel Arteta aims to further reinforce his back line in the summer. Transfer Tal...

item.title: Way-Too-Early All-America team: Forecasting college football's top players in 2026
item.description: From Arch Manning to Jeremiah Smith, these are the best of the best at every position.

item.title: Men's Bubble Watch: Seton Hall keeps NCAA tournament hopes alive for now
item.description: Seton Hall is still fourth in a Big East expected to send three teams to the NCAA tournament.
